pi_items.source: USPTO Trademark database (via Web Search), confirmed on multiple sources including USPTO.report and Furm trademark database. Filing date: February 14, 2018. Registration date: April 30, 2019. Serial number: 87796977.

Web Search confirmed that Mozilla Corporation originally held the trademark (serial 87796977), which was transferred to the Rust Foundation when it was created. Both keywords are correct - the trademark was initially Mozilla's and is now Rust Foundation's.
Justia Trademarks database and Web Search results. Registration number 4754865, Serial number 86400668. Filing date: September 19, 2014. Registration date: June 16, 2015.
Justia Trademarks and Web Search results confirm THE LINUX FOUNDATION as the owner of KUBERNETES trademark registration 4754865.
Justia Trademarks database and Web Search results. Registration number 4692657, Serial number 77318565. Filing date: October 31, 2007. Registration date: February 24, 2015.
Justia Trademarks and Web Search results confirm Google LLC as the owner of ANDROID trademark registration 4692657.
Task definition in task.json. This is an expected output location for the agent task.
Task definition in task.json. This is the expected Firefox bookmark folder name where the agent should store trademark pages.

privileged_info_summary: The USPTO Trademark Search task uses real, publicly available trademark data. The RUST trademark is registered under number 87796977 (filed Feb 2018, registered Apr 2019) owned by Rust Foundation (transferred from Mozilla Corporation). The KUBERNETES trademark is registered under number 4754865 (filed Sep 2014, registered Jun 2015) owned by The Linux Foundation. The ANDROID trademark is registered under number 4692657 (filed Oct 2007, registered Feb 2015) owned by Google LLC. All three trademarks have LIVE/REGISTERED status. The task requires agents to create a JSON report with these registration numbers, owner information, and registration dates, and to bookmark the trademark pages in a Firefox folder named 'Trademark Research'.
